item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-p03","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The assistant immediately brakes the request, names the pattern as scattered arrival information being handled by patches rather than just a missing SMS line, limits the requested parking text to a one-time emergency, and moves upstream to a unified arrival information package covering entrance, parking, signup, and tea-break flow. It does provide temporary SMS wording, but explicitly refuses to make that the default template and proposes consolidation rather than another standing overlay."}
